markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review company performance and announce a major delivery org restructure.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Exceptional Growth:** Q3 run rate grew 55% QoQ to \~$15M, driven by 22 new logos and an 80% pilot conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Financial Health:** The company is cash-flow positive and secured a SAFE from HubSpot, Webflow, and Proof VC, replenishing all 2025 cash burn.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Delivery Org Restructure:** A new model separates client-facing (Engagement Manager) from production (Editor) roles to improve efficiency and scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [**New Strategic Focus:** Directors will become a shared resource, shifting from daily client management to high-impact strategic work guided by a new 4-vector account health score.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

## Topics

### Financials & Performance

  - [**Q3 Growth Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Run Rate: +55% QoQ → \~$15M (projected EOY).](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [New Logos: 22 added, all from inbound/word-of-mouth.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Pilot Conversion: \~80%, up from prior quarters.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Financial Position:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Cash Flow: Positive for the last two months while still investing aggressively.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Funding: Secured a SAFE from HubSpot, Webflow, and Proof VC, replenishing 2025 cash burn.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Gross Margin: Nearing 70%, reflecting a tech-first model over a pure services model.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [**New Business Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [Cresta ($175M Series D): Editorial work.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [Navon ($6B IPO): Content to help reverse a 25% stock drop.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Turnstile (Series A): Full quote-to-cash platform.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Pipeline Highlights:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Brex: $40K Phase 1 + $35K/mo Phase 2 → \>$300K annual potential.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [Ramp: Building a new domain, "the Cashflow Desk."](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [Zapier: Scoping a partnership to build their templates library.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### AI-Led Growth Community Launch

  - [**Purpose:** A self-funded marketing initiative to build the next generation of AI-native growth operators.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Initial Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Sign-ups: \~8,000 in the first week.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Paying Customers: 155.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [Revenue: $40K ARR / $3.5K MRR.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Reinvest all revenue to create the best resources and potentially recruit future talent directly from the community.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Delivery Org Restructure

  - [**Problem:** Diminishing returns on headcount. Adding more people does not proportionally increase capacity, creating a bottleneck that hinders growth and makes renewals unpredictable.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new model separating client-facing from production roles to improve efficiency and scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [**New Roles & Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers (EMs):** Primary client contact, owning the commercial relationship and a book of business.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [**Editors:** Non-client-facing production experts focused on quality and output.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
          - [**Growth Path:** A senior IC path exists for Editors, separate from management.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
      - [**Directors:** Shift to a shared resource model, focusing on high-impact strategic work across accounts, not daily management.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [**Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs):** More FDEs will be added to provide leverage and enable custom work.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
      - [**Shared Editorial Team:** A central pool for production capacity, new employee training, and context-building.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Account Health Score:** A new 4-vector metric to guide strategic work and ensure predictable renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Client alignment on the 6-month growth plan.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [**Quality:** Content exceeding client and audience expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [**Output:** Efficient delivery meeting contractual obligations.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [**Performance:** Measurable outcomes justifying the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [**Relationship:** Client perception and stakeholder enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2843.0)

### Implementation Timeline

  - [**Today:** Andi will share the new org chart and role descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)
  - [**This Week:** Individual role assignments will be sent out.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)
  - [**By Monday, Nov 24:** Account handoff documents must be completed and shared with clients.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3010.0)
  - [**Dec 1:** New roles become active, with EMs and Editors assuming full responsibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3062.0)
  - [**Dec 12:** All transitions must be solidified before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/PspEacys6_iuwL5dNNNTgp3nuvAm1NEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3107.0)
